headline: Fifth Third Bancorp Announces Results of Early Participation in Private Exchange Offers and Consent Solicitations
summary: CINCINNATI, May 22, 2026--Fifth Third Bancorp (Nasdaq: FITB) and Fifth Third Financial Corporation ("FTFC") announced that, in connection with the previously announced offers to Eligible Holders (as defined herein) to exchange (each an "Exchange Offer" and collectively, the "Exchange Offers") any and all outstanding notes originally issued by Comerica Incorporated and assumed by FTFC as successor by merger as set forth in the table below (the "Existing FTFC Notes") for (1) up to $1,550,000,000 a
